message:
fix(e2e): Fix NO_COLOR test by preserving env var in no_color_mode()

The test_no_color_disables_ansi test was failing because no_color_mode()
inherited clear_env from Default which included "NO_COLOR". The test
runner would set NO_COLOR=1, then immediately remove it, leaving the
env var unset.

Fixed by:
1. Modifying no_color_mode() to remove NO_COLOR from clear_env
2. Reordering test runner to clear env vars before setting them

This ensures NO_COLOR=1 is properly set when the test server runs.

Closes: bd-3h0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
